ddls:
CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., microtubule) */,
  "line" INTEGER /* Line number in the measurement series */,
  "channel" INTEGER /* Channel used during the measurement */,
  "mean" REAL /* Mean value of the measurement */,
  "stddev" REAL /* Standard deviation of the measurement */,
  "min" REAL /* Minimum value recorded */,
  "max" REAL /* Maximum value recorded */,
  "int_den" REAL /* Integrated density value */,
  "raw_int_den" INTEGER /* Raw integrated density value */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated experiment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who conducted the measurement */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the measurement */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement was taken */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_measurement_type FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_type") REFERENCES measurement_types ("type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_channel FOREIGN KEY ("channel") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the researcher */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department in which the researcher works */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or title of the researcher */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the researcher */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experiment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher conducting the experiment */,
  "date_conducted" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., Planned, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the experiment */,
  "collaborators" TEXT /* List of other researchers or institutions involved in the experiment */,
  "publication_status" TEXT /* Publication status of the experiment results (e.g., Not Published, Submitted, Published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement type (e.g., microtubule) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement type */,
  "related_samples" TEXT /* Types of biological samples associated with the measurement type */,
  "standard_procedures" TEXT /* Standard procedures or protocols used for this type of measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the channel used */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the channel usage */,
  "wavelength" TEXT /* Wavelength of light used in the channel */,
  "sensitivity" TEXT /* Sensitivity of the channel */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the channel was last calibrated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, analyst) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
column_names: Line number in the measurement series
